description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a smooth, slightly curved butt and a straight comb, typical of mid-20th-century bolt-action military rifles. The barrel is long and slender, finished in a metallic gray, and is secured to the stock with two visible barrel bands. The receiver and bolt assembly are also metallic, with a simple iron sight mounted on top. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined beneath the receiver, and the rifle lacks any visible external magazine, suggesting an internal magazine design. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on durability and function.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, metallic barrel, and iron sights, featuring a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and trigger assembly.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, barrel, and metallic receiver, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
